CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: Damn it... I'm done. You better not mess this up...
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: I'm getting stronger by the second!

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: It can't end like this... I couldn't protect everyone...
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: Fall back, Lea! I'll protect you!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: You've done more than enough, Lea. Save yourself!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: Lea, you strength was impressive. I'll be sure to avenge you!
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: This is the strength I needed to protect everyone!
CharacterDialogues.MidLvlUp: I still have a long way to go, but I'm getting there.
CharacterDialogues.LowLvlUp: How can I help them that way...

CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: Elwyn! We'll take it from here! You can rest now!

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: Lyv... I wished we could've fought together more...
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: You can't die yet, you old man! Get a hold of yourself!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: Sorak, you have to stay alive, go!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: You fought bravely, Sorak. I'll show them what you were made of!
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: I am stronger than ever before.
CharacterDialogues.MidLvlUp: I am still getting a bit stronger.
CharacterDialogues.LowLvlUp: I am too old for all this...

CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: Get back, Lyv. We need you!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: Lyv, we'll help you escape! You've done more than enough.
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: My skills as a healer are getting better!
CharacterDialogues.LowLvlUp: I hope this is enough to keep everyone alive...

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: I... I shouldn't have left my library...
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: I'll cover you, Sieg! Get back!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: Sieg, go heal your wounds in the back! You still have a lot to do!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: Sieg, stand down! I'll take care of the rest!
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: This will be a huge help!

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: Well, I've done more than enough. I'll leave the rest to you.
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: Where are you going, come back here!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: Sure... Do whatever you want, Sir Mir.
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: Yes, let me take care of everything.
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: To think I could get even stronger...
CharacterDialogues.LowLvlUp: It's not like I needed to get any stronger.

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: So this is how it ends...
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: Ruben, we need your strength. You have to survive!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: Magnificently fought, Ruben. You can take a break now.
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: This is the strength I have been looking for.
CharacterDialogues.MidLvlUp: This is better, but still not good enough.

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: Had I known this was my last meal, I would have savored it more...
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: You have too much to do, Gusto! You can't die here!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: Gusto, your defense was legendary! Fall back.
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: I wonder if this will make me a better cook...

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: I'm sorry, everyone... I was not worthy of being your leader... Guardian... I hope you can forgive me...
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: Thank you for watching over me... I'm stronger than ever!
CharacterDialogues.MidLvlUp: I am growing stronger, thanks to you.

CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: Gwenie, you have so much stuff to do! You can't die here!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: Retreat, Gwenie! you've done more than enough!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: Gwenie, if you die, your sister will never forgive me!
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: This is what adventures are all about!
CharacterDialogues.LowLvlUp: I should have stayed with my sister...

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: I guess I saw this coming...
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: Stay alive, Kay! Too many depend on you!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: Kay, you better not die! You have too much to atone for!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: You can't leave me, Kay! I need you!

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: I leave the rest to you, kiddos...
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: Bob, stop playing dead! Fall back!
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: To think my strength could grow even more...
CharacterDialogues.LowLvlUp: My strength has finally reached its peak...

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: I'm sorry, Kay. I failed you...
CharacterDialogues.MidLvlUp: My training is starting to pay off!

CharacterDialogues.DeathQuote: I thought I was strong enough... I guess not...
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: Aurora, Gale needs you! You can't die here!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: Aurora, stay back, we'll cover you!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: You have done well, Aurora. Tend to your wounds.
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: This will be useful to Gale!

CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Zack: Not on my watch, Erica! Run!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Kira: You can't die here, Erica! Retreat!
CharacterDialogues.DeathReaction_Gale: Erica, your time has yet to come! I will protect you!
CharacterDialogues.GoodLvlUp: This will help me kick some butt!
